sounds.name: elevator
sounds.description: Lo-fi warmth. The default. Like being on hold with the future.

sounds.name: typewriter
sounds.description: Mechanical keystrokes over a warm pad. For the nostalgia of physical input.

sounds.name: ambient
sounds.description: Soft textures and gentle drones. The outside world, piped in.

sounds.name: retro
sounds.description: Chiptune arpeggios. Reward your agent with the Music Dance Experience.

sounds.name: minimal
sounds.description: A deep hum. Almost nothing. For those who prefer quiet contemplation.

sounds.name: spotify
sounds.description: Controls your Spotify playback volume. Music fades in when coding starts, fades out when done.

sounds.name: lofi-chill
sounds.description: Calm lo-fi beat with vinyl crackle. Perfect for long coding sessions.

sounds.name: lofi-jazz
sounds.description: Jazzy lo-fi hip hop. Smooth keys over a dusty beat.

sounds.name: deep-focus
sounds.description: Slow evolving pad with binaural undertones. Maximum concentration.

sounds.name: rain
sounds.description: Steady rainfall on a window. Nature's white noise.

sounds.name: forest
sounds.description: Birds and rustling leaves. A woodland morning.

sounds.name: ocean
sounds.description: Waves rolling onto shore. Rhythmic and calming.

sounds.name: thunder
sounds.description: Distant thunder with light rain. Dramatic yet soothing.

sounds.name: classical-piano
sounds.description: Gentle classical piano. Timeless background for deep work.

sounds.name: synthwave
sounds.description: 80s-inspired synth arpeggios. Neon-lit productivity.

sounds.name: jazz-cafe
sounds.description: Upright bass and brushed drums. A quiet corner booth.

sounds.name: mechanical-keyboard
sounds.description: Cherry MX Blue switches. The satisfying click-clack.

sounds.name: clock-tower
sounds.description: Ticking gears and pendulum. Steady mechanical rhythm.

sounds.name: space-drone
sounds.description: Deep space ambience. Low-frequency hum of a starship bridge.

sounds.name: fireplace
sounds.description: Crackling fire with occasional pops. Warm and cozy.

sounds.name: coffee-shop
sounds.description: Muted chatter and clinking cups. The familiar hum of a cafe.

sounds.name: white-noise
sounds.description: Pure white noise. Blocks everything out.
